title: MESS Materials — DFT-Computed Properties
description: JSON Schema for data/mp-materials-rich.json — one record per MESS-Parameters material slug, carrying DFT-computed properties fetched from the Materials Project and derived with pymatgen. Consumed by messai-ai's generate-material-fixtures.ts and rendered on the parameter detail page alongside literature narrative.

mpFunctional.description: DFT exchange-correlation functional used for this field. r2SCAN preferred for transition-metal oxides; PBE is the default MP dataset.

confidenceTier.description: high = direct crystalline MP match for the slug; medium = composite with all component MP matches; low = amorphous-proxy or partial mapping (e.g. carbon fabric → graphite mp-48).

pourbaixState.description: stable = thermodynamic stable phase; passivated = corrodes kinetically but forms a protective oxide layer (Ti, Al, Cr, Ni overrides); corroding = thermodynamically unstable with no known passivation; unknown = Pourbaix diagram unavailable.

stable_phase.description: Formula of the thermodynamically stable phase at this (E, pH) point. Null if the material itself is stable.

decomposition_energy_eV.description: Energy above the Pourbaix hull (eV/atom). 0 = stable. Higher = more unstable.

notes.description: Free-form caveats, e.g. 'passivator override applied (Ti → TiO2 stable)'.

mp_id.description: Materials Project material ID, e.g. mp-48 (graphite), mp-126 (Pt), mp-510408 (β-MnO2).

role.description: How this component is used in the composite material.

loading.description: Mass or volume fraction if known, e.g. '10 wt%'. Null if unspecified.

proxy.description: True when this MP structure is a crystalline proxy for an amorphous or disordered material (e.g. graphite proxying for carbon cloth).

formula.description: Reduced formula, e.g. 'C', 'Pt', 'MnO2'. Populated from MP summary API.

slug.description: MESS-Parameters material slug. Join key across MESS-Parameters and MESS-Materials.

mp_snapshot_date.description: Date of the Materials Project database snapshot this record was fetched from (for reproducibility).

mp_functional_default.description: The functional used for the primary component's summary fields. Individual fields may override via per-field *_functional suffixes in future versions.

band_gap_eV.description: DFT-computed band gap in eV. 0 for metals. Null if not computed for any component (e.g. composite with mixed functionals).

is_metal.description: True when band_gap_eV < 0.01. Primary proxy for electrical conductivity.

formation_energy_eV_per_atom.description: Weighted average across components. Negative = thermodynamically favorable.

energy_above_hull_eV_per_atom.description: Weighted average. 0 = ground-state stable phase. >0.05 = metastable; >0.1 = unlikely to survive long-term aqueous exposure.

total_magnetization_uB.description: Total magnetic moment per unit cell in Bohr magnetons. Relevant for magnetic-field effects on biofilm behavior (underexplored in MES literature).

mfc_anode.description: Stability at (-0.3 V vs SHE, pH 7).

mfc_cathode.description: Stability at (+0.2 V vs SHE, pH 7).

mec_cathode.description: Stability at (-0.7 V vs SHE, pH 7).

structure_cif.description: Primary component's crystal structure as CIF text. Reserved for MLIP feature extraction in v0.3+.

notes.description: Free-form producer-side caveats not captured by confidence_tier (e.g. 'MnO2 beta-phase used; alpha-phase would yield different Pourbaix result').

mess_parameters_tag.description: The MESS-Parameters tag whose slug vocabulary this dataset was generated against, e.g. 'v0.2.0'.
